provenance: Synthetic image-only PDF modelled after the RVL-CDIP invoice class (Harley et al. 2015). Full dataset: https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~aharley/rvl-cdip/ (License: RVL-CDIP terms — research use). This file: programmatically generated white-page JPEG-in-PDF for CI reproducibility.
notes: Image-only page; PdfParser should route through OCR path (no text layer). Asserted as non-zero bytes; real OCR requires live Textract (integration marker).

provenance: Synthetic image-only PDF modelled after DocLayNet invoice pages (Pfitzmann et al. 2022). Full dataset: https://github.com/DS4SD/DocLayNet (Apache 2.0). This file: programmatically generated for CI reproducibility.
Hand-authored logistics format template. Fictional shipper/consignee; realistic BL/container identifiers (MSCU1234567, HLCUSHA230901234). No third-party IP.
notes: Text-layer PDF. BL number HLCUSHA230901234, container MSCU1234567.

provenance: Hand-authored commercial invoice template. Fictional parties; realistic HS codes and identifiers.
Hand-authored packing list template. Fictional parties; realistic container/seal identifiers.
Hand-authored booking confirmation template. Carrier name used nominally for format testing only.
Hand-assembled hard case. Two distinct commercial invoices (INV-2024-10001 and INV-2024-10002) on separate pages in one PDF file.
notes: Two pages, each with a full invoice. ProposeRegionsUseCase must yield >= 2 invoice-typed proposed regions (D-17).

provenance: Hand-assembled hard case. Single page containing BL header, container status table, and inline invoice reference — simulating a nested/overlapping entity layout.
notes: Nested entities: BL MSCU2024-00551 + container TCKU3001234 status + invoice INV-NEST-0099. Region children should carry parent_component_id linkage (D-17).

provenance: Programmatically truncated PDF with garbage trailer bytes. Mimics a corrupt/partially-downloaded attachment.
notes: Parser must not raise; must degrade to parse-error Component. ProposeRegionsUseCase must yield zero or only unknown-typed regions (D-17, T-04-31).

provenance: Programmatically generated image-only PDF simulating a photographed screen (JPEG wrapped in PDF). No embedded text layer.
notes: Image-only; PdfParser routes through OCR. Real OCR requires live Textract (integration marker). Asserted non-zero bytes (D-17).
